executives.name: Jim Hagemann Snabe
executives.background: Chairman of the Supervisory Board of Siemens AG. Former Co-CEO of SAP SE. He serves on various boards including Northvolt AB.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Kelly Ayotte
executives.background: Former U.S. Senator for New Hampshire and former Attorney General of New Hampshire.

executives.name: Michael Boskin
executives.background: Tully M. Friedman Professor of Economics and Senior Fellow, Hoover Institution, Stanford University.

executives.name: Roderick McGeary
executives.background: Former Chairman of BearingPoint, Inc. and former Co-Vice Chairman of KPMG LLP.
